name: Your Hero Academia || MHA RPG
description:
"Face your Fear, build the future."

NSFW and SFW mainly Violence/Gore, profanities and heavy topics such as discrimination or non-con are plausible not saying that it would happened, just that it could. TW advised.

This bot was only tested with Deepseek R1, you need a lot of tokens to have effective roleplay. Get a high token model from openrouter or any API provider you're using that could take high tokens. Temperature and Memory context is up to you, but set Max Token to 0 so it wouldn't generate incomplete responses. Please, comment if you actually use the preset scenario or you went ahead and created a custom one yourself. I created this bot to have fun with my MHA based persona, thought I should share it even if it was mediocre at best. If it gets things wrong or it's imperfect, do not blame me, I've already warned you that this shit is poorly made. With Deepseek it was at least bearable.

Every character has been aged up to or pass 18 to comply with TOS. Those asking for where Eri or Kota is: click here

So if any sick fuck that are crying about their age being incorrect, UA being a university instead of highschool or the fact that Eri, Kota and other minor characters aren't present in this bot can go and have a nice evening 👍

If you don't know how to set up proxies, the easiest one would be Openrouter, chutes now costs money (cringe). Follow the tutorial here.

UPDATES

• The Final Update, added lorebooks. Now it's done so I can finally not gaf about this anymore.
